raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has the largest number and fastest growing start-ups and small businesses in the country.",
    "The California Small Business Technical Assistance Expansion Program (SB TAEP) was created to expand the capacity of federal small business technical assistance programs in California.",
    "The SB TAEP provides state grant funding to expand consulting and training services provided by existing and new technical assistance centers.",
    "Technical assistance centers designated by federal funding partners operate federal small business technical assistance programs throughout California.",
    "Technical assistance centers provide one-on-one, confidential consulting, and training to help small businesses and entrepreneurs start, expand, facilitate investment, and create jobs.",
    "Services provided by the Veteran Business Outreach Center include financial management, cybersecurity requirements, procurement, and social media and e-commerce marketing platforms.",
```
